name: MatchSquad
tagline: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for managing tennis and padel tournaments
description: A multi-tenant SaaS platform for organizing and managing sports tournaments in tennis and padel. Features organization management with invitations, category configuration, and a real-time backend powered by Convex. Built with OTP-based authentication via email using Resend.
highlights: Multi-tenant architecture with organization-based access control
Real-time backend with Convex for live tournament updates
OTP email authentication via Convex Auth and Resend
Admin panel for managing organizations, categories, and invitations
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code and Cursor AI assistance
